Docs

6 files in /builds/ — searchable knowledge base

📄
cold-caller-script.mdSales
Full cold call script for landscaping outreach. Opening hook, 6 objection handlers, voicemail script, booking confirmation language, 5-attempt call cadence, GHL logging guide, daily dial targets (80-100 dials, 1-2 bookings/caller/day).
builds/2026-03-15/cold-caller-script.md18.4 KB2026-03-15
📄
sms-outreach-sequence.mdOutreach
5-touch SMS sequence over 10 days. Personalization tokens: [FirstName], [City], [CompanyName]. Response handling for 7 common replies. DNC rules, sending safety guidelines, city targeting priority for spring 2026.
builds/2026-03-15/sms-outreach-sequence.md12.1 KB2026-03-15
📄
new-offer-pitch-framework.mdSales
15-min sales call structure (warm up → pain → pitch → close). Word-for-word pitch script. New offer: $1k/10 appts or $2.5k/30 appts. Objection guide, 4-touch post-call follow-up sequence, onboarding checklist.
builds/2026-03-15/new-offer-pitch-framework.md15.7 KB2026-03-15
📄
caller-onboarding-sop.mdOperations
Day-by-day Week 1 onboarding plan for new cold callers. Script walkthrough → role play → live call ramp. Daily process (morning, during, EOD recap). All GHL dispositions defined. Escalation triggers. Quality standards: 80+ dials/day, 1-2 bookings/day by week 2.
builds/2026-03-15/caller-onboarding-sop.md14.2 KB2026-03-15
📄
mission-control-setup.mdTechnical
Setup instructions for Mission Control dashboard. Requirements, installation steps, environment variables, how to run locally at localhost:3000, GitHub repo link.
builds/2026-03-15/mission-control-setup.md3.8 KB2026-03-16
📄
clutch-conversion-audit.mdClient Work
Full CRO audit of clutchbarbersupply.com. What's working, what's killing conversions, kill list, full redesign strategy with projected impact. Backed by competitor research and Shopify CRO data.
builds/2026-03-15/clutch-conversion-audit.md22.6 KB2026-03-16
